headline: S&P Global (SPGI) Launches AI Data Service And Pantera Backed Digital Asset Index
summary: S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) launched its AI-powered Adaptive Retrieval data service, allowing clients to access and assemble licensed data using natural language queries for a range of AI workflows. The company also introduced the S&P Pantera Digital Asset Index in partnership with Pantera Capital, expanding its offerings in digital asset data and indexing. S&P Global enters these product launches with its shares at $431.26 and a mixed recent track record, with the stock down 15.9% year to date...
